zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine於1377年出生在英國賀福爾布雷德沃迪時，他的父親Roger Hynaf Vaughan36歲，母親Anne Devereaux32歲。他於大約1407年與Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam在英國賀福爾布雷德沃迪結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年10月25日在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒阿吉古特享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine于1377年出生在英国賀福爾布雷德沃迪时，他的父亲Roger Hynaf Vaughan36岁，母亲Anne Devereaux32岁。他于大约1407年与Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam在英国賀福爾布雷德沃迪结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年10月25日在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒阿吉古特享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

variants.name: Von
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Veon
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .

variants.name: Vaughns
meanings: Welsh: variant of Vaughan , with English patronymic -s.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine was born in 1377, in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England, his father, Roger Hynaf Vaughan, was 36 and his mother, Anne Devereaux, was 32. He married Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam about 1407, in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 October 1415, in Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 38.

fr.Tretower, Breconshire, Wales: Tretower, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine est né en 1377, à Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Hynaf Vaughan, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anne Devereaux, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam environ 1407, à Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1415, à Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine 1377 in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Hynaf Vaughan 36 und seine Mutter Anne Devereaux 32. Er hat um 1407 in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1415 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine è nato il nel 1377 nel Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Hynaf Vaughan, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Anne Devereaux, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam circa 1407, nel Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1415, nel Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardineが1377年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブレドワーディンで生まれた時，父Roger Hynaf Vaughanは36歳，母Anne Devereauxは32歳であった。約1407年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブレドワーディンでGwladys ferch Dafydd Gamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年10月25日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルアジンコウルトで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine(이)가 1377년 영국 허퍼드실르 브레드워딘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Hynaf Vaughan(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Devereaux(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1407년 영국 허퍼드실르 브레드워딘에서 Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 10월 25일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 아긴쿠르트에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine nasceu em 1377, em Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Hynaf Vaughan, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anne Devereaux, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam aproximadamente 1407, em Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1415, em Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine родился в 1377 г. в местности бредвардаин, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Hynaf Vaughan было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Devereaux, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam около 1407 г. в местности бредвардаин, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 октября 1415 г. в местности агинкоурт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine nació en 1377, en Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Hynaf Vaughan, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anne Devereaux, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam aproximadamente 1407, en Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1415, en Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 38 años.
